children.heading: .—Cape town treaty
children.label: 1 .—Cape town treaty
children.text: The term “Cape Town Treaty” means the Convention on International Interests in Mobile Equipment, as modified by the Protocol to the Convention on International Interests in Mobile Equipment on Matters Specific to Aircraft Equipment, signed at Rome on .May 9, 2003

children.heading: .—United states entry point
children.label: 2 .—United states entry point
children.text: The term “United States Entry Point” means the Federal Aviation Administration Civil Aviation Registry.

children.heading: .—International registry
children.label: 3 .—International registry
children.text: The term “International Registry” means the registry established under the Cape Town Treaty.
